description_long: This is a metallic travel kettle with a cylindrical body finished in a glossy copper-brown color. It features a sturdy, black, side-mounted handle and a flat, removable lid with a small tab for easy opening. The base is slightly extended and appears to house an integrated heating element, with a power cord and car adapter plug attached, indicating it is designed for use in vehicles. The front of the kettle displays a subtle 'EXPEDITION' logo with a graphic, adding a touch of branding. The overall design is sleek and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on portability and utility.
description: Glossy copper-brown travel kettle with a black handle, removable lid, and integrated car adapter for heating on the go.
description_view_0: Front view showing the copper body, black handle, and attached car adapter cord.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full length of the black handle and the cord trailing behind.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the 'EXPEDITION' logo and the car adapter plug positioned to the right.
description_view_3: Back view with the handle out of sight, focusing on the smooth copper surface and the cord looping around.
attribute_lid_design: flat removable lid with small tab
